name: @aily-project/board-xiao_rp2040
description: The Seeed Studio XIAO RP2040 is a compact microcontroller board based on the Raspberry Pi RP2040 chip, featuring a dual-core ARM Cortex-M0+ processor at up to 133 MHz, 264 KB SRAM, 2 MB Flash, 11 multi-function GPIO pins, and USB-C, in Seeed Studio's tiny XIAO form factor.
author: Seeed
